result.stdout:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow [options]
  meadow [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  app build         Compile a Meadow application 
  app config set    Sets app.config.yaml setting values 
  app config show   Shows the connected device's app.config.yaml settings 
  app debug         Debug a running Meadow application 
  app deploy        Deploys a previously compiled Meadow application to a target device 
  app run           Build, trim and deploy a Meadow application to a target device 
  app trim          Trim a pre-compiled Meadow application 
  cloud apikey create  Create a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud apikey delete  Delete a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud apikey list  List your Meadow.Cloud API keys 
  cloud apikey update  Update a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud collection list  List Meadow Collections 
  cloud command publish  Publish a command to Meadow devices via Meadow.Cloud 
  cloud package create  Create a Meadow Package (MPAK) 
  cloud package list  Lists all Meadow Packages (MPAK) 
  cloud package publish  Publishes a Meadow Package (MPAK) 
  cloud package upload  Upload a Meadow Package (MPAK) to Meadow.Cloud 
  config            Read or modify the meadow CLI configuration Subcommands: config route, config source.
  developer         Sets a specified developer parameter on the Meadow 
  device clock      Gets or sets the device clock (in UTC time). Use either 'now' or a date/time inside single quotes 
  device config set  Sets meadow.config.yaml setting values 
  device config show  Shows the connected device's meadow.config.yaml settings 
  device config wifi  Configure the connected device's wifi settings 
  device info       Get the device info 
  device provision  Registers and prepares connected device for use with Meadow Cloud 
  device reset      Resets the device 
  dfu install       Install dfu-util to the host operating system 
  file delete       Deletes a file from the device 
  file delete-all   Deletes all files from the device 
  file initial      Display the initial bytes from a device file 
  file list         Lists the files in the current device directory 
  file read         Reads a file from the device and writes it to the local file system 
  file write        Writes one or more files to the device from the local file system 
  firmware default  Sets the current default firmware package 
  firmware delete   Delete a local firmware package 
  firmware download  Download a firmware package 
  firmware list     List locally available firmware 
  firmware write    Writes firmware files to a connected meadow device 
  flash erase       Erase the contents of the device flash storage 
  listen            Listen for console output from Meadow 
  login             Log in to your Wilderness Labs account 
  logout            Log out of your Wilderness Labs account 
  nsh disable       Disables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device 
  nsh enable        Enables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device 
  port list         List available local serial ports 
  port select       Select a port from a list of available local serial ports 
  project install   Install or updates to the latest project templates 
  project new       Shows a list of project templates to choose from. 
  runtime disable   Sets the runtime to NOT run on the Meadow board then resets it 
  runtime enable    Sets the runtime to run on the Meadow board then resets it 
  runtime state     Gets the device's current runtime state 
  source checkout   Pulls a single-named branch of all Meadow source repositories 
  source clone      Clones any missing local Meadow source repositories 
  source fetch      Fetches each of the local Meadow source repositories 
  source pull       Pulls each of the local Meadow source repositories 
  source status     Compares the local Meadow source repositories with the remotes 
  telemetry         Manage participation in telemetry sharing Subcommands: telemetry disable, telemetry enable.
  trace disable     Disable trace logging on the Meadow 
  trace enable      Enable trace logging on the Meadow 
  trace level       Sets the trace logging level on the Meadow 
  uart profiler disable  Disables profiling data output to UART 
  uart profiler enable  Enables profiling data output to UART 
  uart trace disable  Disables trace log output to UART 
  uart trace enable  Enables trace log output to UART 

You can run `meadow [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

commands.payload:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow [options]
  meadow [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  app build         Compile a Meadow application 
  app config set    Sets app.config.yaml setting values 
  app config show   Shows the connected device's app.config.yaml settings 
  app debug         Debug a running Meadow application 
  app deploy        Deploys a previously compiled Meadow application to a target device 
  app run           Build, trim and deploy a Meadow application to a target device 
  app trim          Trim a pre-compiled Meadow application 
  cloud apikey create  Create a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud apikey delete  Delete a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud apikey list  List your Meadow.Cloud API keys 
  cloud apikey update  Update a Meadow.Cloud API key 
  cloud collection list  List Meadow Collections 
  cloud command publish  Publish a command to Meadow devices via Meadow.Cloud 
  cloud package create  Create a Meadow Package (MPAK) 
  cloud package list  Lists all Meadow Packages (MPAK) 
  cloud package publish  Publishes a Meadow Package (MPAK) 
  cloud package upload  Upload a Meadow Package (MPAK) to Meadow.Cloud 
  config            Read or modify the meadow CLI configuration Subcommands: config route, config source.
  developer         Sets a specified developer parameter on the Meadow 
  device clock      Gets or sets the device clock (in UTC time). Use either 'now' or a date/time inside single quotes 
  device config set  Sets meadow.config.yaml setting values 
  device config show  Shows the connected device's meadow.config.yaml settings 
  device config wifi  Configure the connected device's wifi settings 
  device info       Get the device info 
  device provision  Registers and prepares connected device for use with Meadow Cloud 
  device reset      Resets the device 
  dfu install       Install dfu-util to the host operating system 
  file delete       Deletes a file from the device 
  file delete-all   Deletes all files from the device 
  file initial      Display the initial bytes from a device file 
  file list         Lists the files in the current device directory 
  file read         Reads a file from the device and writes it to the local file system 
  file write        Writes one or more files to the device from the local file system 
  firmware default  Sets the current default firmware package 
  firmware delete   Delete a local firmware package 
  firmware download  Download a firmware package 
  firmware list     List locally available firmware 
  firmware write    Writes firmware files to a connected meadow device 
  flash erase       Erase the contents of the device flash storage 
  listen            Listen for console output from Meadow 
  login             Log in to your Wilderness Labs account 
  logout            Log out of your Wilderness Labs account 
  nsh disable       Disables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device 
  nsh enable        Enables the Nuttx shell on the Meadow device 
  port list         List available local serial ports 
  port select       Select a port from a list of available local serial ports 
  project install   Install or updates to the latest project templates 
  project new       Shows a list of project templates to choose from. 
  runtime disable   Sets the runtime to NOT run on the Meadow board then resets it 
  runtime enable    Sets the runtime to run on the Meadow board then resets it 
  runtime state     Gets the device's current runtime state 
  source checkout   Pulls a single-named branch of all Meadow source repositories 
  source clone      Clones any missing local Meadow source repositories 
  source fetch      Fetches each of the local Meadow source repositories 
  source pull       Pulls each of the local Meadow source repositories 
  source status     Compares the local Meadow source repositories with the remotes 
  telemetry         Manage participation in telemetry sharing Subcommands: telemetry disable, telemetry enable.
  trace disable     Disable trace logging on the Meadow 
  trace enable      Enable trace logging on the Meadow 
  trace level       Sets the trace logging level on the Meadow 
  uart profiler disable  Disables profiling data output to UART 
  uart profiler enable  Enables profiling data output to UART 
  uart trace disable  Disables trace log output to UART 
  uart trace enable  Enables trace log output to UART 

You can run `meadow [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow cloud apikey create <NAME> --duration <value> --scopes <values...> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Create a Meadow.Cloud API key

PARAMETERS
* NAME              The name of the API key 

OPTIONS
* -d|--duration     The duration of the API key, in days 
* -s|--scopes       The list of scopes (permissions) to grant the API key 
  --host            The Meadow.Cloud endpoint. Default: "https://www.meadowcloud.co".
  --apikey          The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow cloud command publish <COMMAND_NAME> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Publish a command to Meadow devices via Meadow.Cloud

PARAMETERS
* COMMAND_NAME      The name of the command 

OPTIONS
  -c|--collectionId  The target collection for publishing the command 
  -d|--deviceIds    The target devices for publishing the command 
  -a|--args         The arguments for the command as a JSON string 
  -q|--qos          The MQTT-defined quality of service for the command Choices: "AtLeastOnce", "AtMostOnce", "ExactlyOnce". Default: "AtLeastOnce".
  --host            The Meadow.Cloud endpoint. Default: "https://www.meadowcloud.co".
  --apikey          The API key to use with Meadow.Cloud. Otherwise, use the logged in Wilderness Labs account. Environment variable: MC_APIKEY. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow cloud package create <projectpath> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Create a Meadow Package (MPAK)

PARAMETERS
  projectpath       Path to project file 

OPTIONS
  -c|--configuration  The build configuration to compile Default: "Release".
  -n|--name         Name of the mpak file to be created 
  -f|--filter       Glob pattern to filter files. ex ('app.dll', 'app*','{app.dll,meadow.dll}') Default: "**/*".
  -v|--osVersion    Target OS version for the app 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

USAGE
  meadow developer [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Sets a specified developer parameter on the Meadow

OPTIONS
  -p|--param        The parameter to set. Default: "0".
  -v|--value        The value to apply to the parameter. Valid values are 0 to 4,294,967,295. Default: "0".
  -t|--timeout      The Test timeout value. Default is 60 seconds. Default: "60".
  -s                Meadow serial port. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  Time

  -s                Meadow serial port. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow device provision [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Registers and prepares connected device for use with Meadow Cloud

OPTIONS
  -o|--orgId        The target org for device registration 
  -c|--collectionId  The target collection for device registration 
  -n|--name         Device friendly name 
  -h|--host         Optionally set a host (default is https://www.meadowcloud.co) 
  -k|--public-key   The public key of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device. 
  -i|--id           The unique ID/serial number of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device. 
  --gen-command     Generate a provisioning command for the configured device Default: "False".
  -s                Meadow serial port.

commands.payload:
meadow v2.5.1

USAGE
  meadow device provision [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Registers and prepares connected device for use with Meadow Cloud

OPTIONS
  -o|--orgId        The target org for device registration 
  -c|--collectionId  The target collection for device registration 
  -n|--name         Device friendly name 
  -h|--host         Optionally set a host (default is https://www.meadowcloud.co) 
  -k|--public-key   The public key of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device. 
  -i|--id           The unique ID/serial number of the device to provision.  If not provided, it will be queried from the configured device. 
  --gen-command     Generate a provisioning command for the configured device Default: "False".
  -s                Meadow serial port.
Unrecognized option(s):
--help

USAGE
  meadow firmware write <firmwarefiletypes...> [options]

  -v|--version      
  -d|--use-dfu      Force using DFU/HCOM for writing files Default: "True".
  -f|--file         Send only the specified file 
  -s|--serialnumber  Flash the specified device 
  -s                Meadow serial port. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

  meadow uart profiler enable --interface <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Enables profiling data output to UART

OPTIONS
* -i|--interface    Set the serial interface to read the profiling data via COM1 
  -o|--outputDirectory  Set the profiling data output directory path 
  -s                Meadow serial port. 
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

DESCRIPTION
  Disables trace log output to UART

OPTIONS

  -h|--help         Shows help text.
